LAW AND MOTION 302, HEARING RE; PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (U.S.A.), N.A.'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE AND VACATE DEFAULT JUDGMENT; DISMISSING WITH PREJUDICE. NOT CONTESTED. NO APPEARANCES, THE TENTATIVE RULING IS ADOPTED AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF'S UNOPPOSED "MOTION TO SET ASIDE AND VACATE DEFAULT JUDGMENT; DISMISSING WITH PREJUDICE [CCP 473]" IS GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE TENTATIVE RULING. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER. CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA. DEPUTY: MALONE. MATTER NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside And Va Cate Default Judgment; Dismissing With Prejudice
Off Calendar Jun-06-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Hearing re; PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (U.S.A.), N.A.'s Motion To Set Aside And Vacate Default Judgment; Dismissing With Prejudice.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion to set aside and vacate default judgment; dismissing with prejudice [CCP 473]" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: Malone. Matter not reported. (302/RBU)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-19-2010 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants
